7.1:
Found a bonfire...
now what should I do?
8.subtitle: Dwelling in Adventurer's Path
8.description:
A strange creature that loves eating strawberries
It has tough skin and absurd defense, but since 
it’s so focused on strawberries,  
it lacks much urge to attack. Because of that,
passing adventurers often end up feeding it…
8.1:
ASABA looks at me with anticipation—
Did it smell something on me...?
8.2:
ASABA looks at me curiously—
Did it smell something on me...?
8.3:
ASABA looks at me with disgust—
Did I really upset it...?
8.6:
ASABA finished the food with a blank look—
Maybe it didn’t like it...
8.7:
ASABA seems very pleased with the strawberry—
Granted a strange blessing by ASABA!
8.8:
ASABA looks at me with disgust—
Was it that bad...? The food just now...
8.11:
………………!
now ASABA holds a grudge against me…
9.description:
A fish shadow swimming underwater that quickly 
flees when it senses someone approaching.
What could be the right way to catch them...?
10.description:
A cat eared girl from a small village, 
looking both cute and energetic.
The katana at her waist hints that 
she is far from ordinary.
She travels around seeking duels with 
strong opponents, though her flashy behavior 
always makes one worry she might attract 
some shady adults...
10.1:
I’m just here to challenge myself. I’m not really 
interested in the truth of the Grand Labyrinth.
10.2:
That thing you’re carrying is...!
Are you also a fan of yuusha-sama!?
10.3:
A wooden sword of such high quality
isn’t easy to come by...
10.5:
Would you like to spar with me?
I really want to see how we measure up as rivals.
10.7:
That’s great!
Let’s start right away!
10.9:
But if you ever become interested,
I’ll be happy to fight you anytime.
10.10:
Born in Shiri Village...
My ambition is to become a Sword Saint!
10.12:
Ahh... you seem to be alright.
That’s such a relief!
10.13:
I’m terribly sorry
for proposing such a duel earlier!
10.14:
It seems I may have gone 
a bit too far... But!
10.15:
Since it’s a duel, I’ll give it 
it my all without holding back.
10.17:
That’s some impressive fighting spirit!
Needless to say, I won’t refuse your challenge!
10.19:
You’re truly amazing.
That final strike was beautiful.
10.20:
That unpredictable fighting style
was truly eye opening!
10.21:
Dragging you into such an unreasonable duel
without offering any reward feels wrong...
10.22:
Please take this—it's a skill I developed myself.
I’m sure it’ll be useful to you!
10.23:
It might sound a bit boastful,
but I’m already the strongest in my village.
10.24:
Still, thanks to you, I’ve learned that 
there’s always someone stronger out there.
10.25:
Well then—
Time to train harder with my sword!!
11.description:
A knight clad in armor that radiates an ominous 
aura. Because the helmet is tightly sealed, 
their voice is muffled, making it impossible to 
determine their gender or age.
they claims to be a game developer and, 
in search of creative inspiration, 
asks adventurers about their journeys 
and offers material support in return. 
Also, they seems to know the Abyss well—
11.1:
……Ohhh! Have you also come here 
in pursuit of the Grand Labyrinth?
11.2:
You may have heard of me—
I am but a humble game developer by trade.
11.3:
Drawn in by this Grand Labyrinth,
I wished to share its mysterious allure with the world.
11.4:
Yet, I must admit with some shame that I am no warrior,
and can only express this passion through creation.
11.5:
…Hm?Are you perhaps 
curious about this armor?
11.6:
Hahaha… It’s nothing more 
than a personal hobby of mine!
11.7:
By donning such equipment like this,
I can at least feel somewhat like an adventurer.
11.8:
Of course—it’s incredibly heavy!
In fact, I can barely move under its weight…
11.9:
But even so…!
I will never give in!
11.10:
So many heroes and legends gather in this place,
and I must continue gathering inspiration and materials.
11.11:
That being said, if you don’t mind,
would you be willing to try my humble work?
11.12:
I’m certain it will be of help
in your exploration——
11.13:
…What!? You don’t know who I am,
and lack a device capable of running games!?
11.14:
Fear not! To prepare for such situations,
I always carry missionary tools with me!
11.15:
Our meeting here is a kind of fate,
so I shall offer the device at cost price!
11.16:
Furthermore, to aid fellow adventurers,
I also happen to run a small shop——
11.17:
Naturally, this is also because I must
secure funds to continue development…
11.18:
So if you find yourself interested,
I would greatly appreciate your patronage!
11.19:
Hahaha, then the pact is sealed.
I await your thoughts after you have played.
11.20:
And should you be willing to share your tales,
they may yet inspire my future creations.
11.31:
Oh? We meet again!
my fellow.
11.32:
We cross paths once more.
Well then—
have you found any interest in 
taking part in my great undertaking?
11.33:
Well then? Have you 
taken anything away from my game?
11.34:
So you seek an antidote for your family—
A resolve worthy of respect.
11.35:
Regrettably, 
I must confess my own inadequacy.
Of the alchemical secret known as Elixir Rubrum, 
I know but little...
11.36:
At your present level of arms and equipment,
The descent into the Abyss will not be an easy trial.
11.37:
I advise you to prepare more supplies,
Or to take time and study the true nature of your weapons.
11.38:
Many alchemical remnants from bygone eras 
lie scattered here.
Observe them carefully—
you may yet uncover their true purpose.
11.39:
I too collect items of practical use.
Should you wish, I would welcome your patronage.
11.40:
Among monsters dwell intelligent races, versed in human speech,
Some of whom bear no ill will toward mankind.
11.41:
Should you encounter them on your journey,
Do not be surprised— 
you may even trade for valuable information.
11.42:
Take care on your journey,
my fellow.
11.43:
There is no need to hurry.
Return when the need arises.
11.44:
You require \ii[\v[84]]?
Then the price shall be \c[6]\v[85]\c[0] yen.
11.45:
You require \ii[\v[84]]?
For a fellow kindred, \c[6]\v[85]\c[0] yen will suffice.
11.47:
May this item Help you 
overcome the trials before you.
11.48:
A wise decision. May it 
serve you well when it matters most.
11.49:
You seem somewhat impatient.
Even among adventurers, all trades require fair terms.
11.50:
Do not force yourself.
Return when your purse is better prepared.
11.51:
Impressive—you have purchased everything.
That is all I can offer for today.
11.52:
My stock is now exhausted.
That these items found their way to you is satisfaction enough.
11.53:
Ah. 
this oversight is mine.
Were you looking for this? 
To find it at my feet… how curious.
11.54:
Now then, Has fortune 
brought you anything of interest?
11.55:
(Hmm… there doesn’t seem to be
anything worth sharing…)
11.56:
Shared some thoughts about 
\str[120] playing Shadow Souls.
11.57:
Oh! To receive praise from your family—
it truly is a great honor for me.
11.58:
With that, I feel even more 
motivated to work on updates.
11.59:
That said, it seems I still haven’t
heard your own evaluation yet.
11.60:
Hm? Big… white…
and very soft?
11.61:
…Is there really something in my game
that would inspire such an impression?
11.62:
Oh no. I got too absorbed in that 
sensation and misspoke…
11.63:
Shared information that the mushrooms growing on 
walking mushrooms are actually quite tasty.
11.64:
Monster cuisine, you say! What a novel idea!
As expected of you.
11.65:
Shared information that the strange birds in the dungeon
have extremely noisy cries.
11.66:
A juvenile Garuda, perhaps… I wonder which would be 
more overwhelming compared to the legendary dragon roar.
11.67:
Shared information that orc meat
is remarkably delicious.
11.68:
Shared information about a hidden passage in the Labyrinth
that connects to the outside world.
11.69:
It looks like a passage left behind by a previous engineering team.
I heard they once planned to excavate the entire Labyrinth.
11.70:
However, the project suddenly stalled halfway through.
No one knows what kind of trouble they ran into.
11.71:
Shared information about a strange mushroom house
at the end of the forest where people get lost.
11.72:
I’ve heard many adventurers lose their way inside…
but as expected of you, you managed to make it through safely.
11.73:
As for that enormous mushroom house…
it certainly makes one curious what kind of creature lives within.
11.74:
Shared an experience of unfortunately
falling into a pit inside the dungeon.
11.75:
Hahaha…! That truly is an embarrassing experience.
As an adventurer, one must always be aware of their surroundings.
11.76:
Shared information about discovering a mech
in an unknown area.
11.77:
I see… what a remarkable encounter. As expected,
the Great Labyrinth still hides traces of ancient civilizations.
11.78:
…So it has already vanished.
I have no reason to doubt your account.
11.79:
This must be a matter of fate.
Someday, it will surely appear once again.
11.80:
Shared information that jelly made from slimes
surprisingly has quite a good texture.
11.81:
Oh, my fellow!
Come and take this!
11.82:
During these days, you’ve given me 
quite a lot of interesting inspiration.
If I didn’t offer at least a small token of thanks, 
it would hardly feel right.
11.83:
This is an outfit I personally designed
for promoting the game.
Please accept it as a gift that 
represents my appreciation.
11.84:
(Huh... a bonus T-shirt...?
W-what should I do...)
11.85:
(I really don’t want to wear 
something like this outside...
I wonder if \str[120] would like 
this kind of outfit...)
11.86:
…I see. Are you looking for something 
interesting to watch late at night?
11.87:
What a coincidence! I’ve collected
quite a number of tapes for inspiration.
11.88:
There are plenty of interesting ones among them—
I wouldn’t mind letting you have one.
11.89:
As always, I hope 
you’ll continue to support my business…!
12.description:
It seems to be a machine operated and 
managed by the Maid Bunny.
It’s not entirely clear why monsters would want 
to imitate humans and run a business,
but everyone has naturally come to accept it.
By the way, carrot milk has the worst reviews.
12.1:
A strange vending machine...
A bottle of drink... \c[6]\v[86]\c[0] yen.
12.3:
No...
I don't have enough money...
12.4:
"Due to damage by unknown individuals, 
a temporary repair penalty has been added..."
Until the penalty is fully paid... 
a bottle of drink... \c[6]\v[86]\c[0] yen!?
13.subtitle: Demonic Sister of The Fallen Church
14.description: There seems to be something under the water...
15.description:
A high-rank monster evolved from the 
Horned Rabbit. For monster, horns serve both 
as weapons and as cores for storing mana.
Unlike the Horned Rabbit, it’s highly aggressive
When excited, its body turns red as mana surges, 
and it launches rapid, repeated charges.
16.description:
A being so infamous that even its name 
became taboo. In theory, it’s almost harmless—
but its terrifying appearance and unpredictable 
movements are enough to throw everyone 
present into chaos.
18.description:
A long-neglected stone monument, 
now cracked and weathered.
You can tell it was once exquisitely carved.
Even after all these years, it still
carries an aura that inspires quiet awe.
22.description:
Fanatics devoted to the Abyssal power 
and the Tower's curse.
They believe this untamable power will bring 
the world rebirth, even if it is built upon 
the suffering of all—
24.description:
A strange girl always dressed as a maid with rabbit ears.
Possesses the ability to teleport, 
appearing from all sorts of strange holes.
Frequently teases adventurers but is mostly harmless.
24.1:
……Usa?
Why are you so ugly usa…?
24.2:
Usa…… I smell…
you have the scent of carrots, usa…
25.description:
A very rare magical creature that 
resembles a dragon hatchling.
It is a spirit given physical form by absorbing the
mana residue leaked by the dragon kin.
Extremely timid, 
it will flee the moment it senses danger...
28.subtitle: Dwelling in the water
29.subtitle: Still Under Suppression
29.description:
A Lust Demon freed from the tower, 
its true power still suppressed.
Surprisingly gentlemanly and talkative for 
a demon of its kind. However, once piqued, 
its thick ritual implement will leave
its opponent with deep psychological scars.
32.description:
A gacha machine summoned by a Tarot card.
It eats up whatever adventurers offer it.
When satisfied, it happily spins and 
finally spits out a reward-filled capsule.
But be careful not to overfeed it—though it's
a machine, it seems to get food poisoning...
32.2:
I found a weird gacha machine...
Its expression looks like \str[120]'s...
32.3:
Try inserting money
Try feeding it
32.4: But I don’t have enough money to feed it…
41.description:
A mobile shop run by two catgirls.
They show up flashily when adventurers call.
Goods are mostly Abyss junk they found.
Watch out, prices can be a total ripoff.
Look down on them, and get beaten up...
PS:\c[2]Blacklisted by the Maid Bunnies 
\c[2]for stealing customers.
41.1:
Hi~! Welcome, nya♪ Take your time looking around,
and feel free to ask me anything, nya!
43.description:
A strange monster often found in jungles, 
much larger than regular mushrooms.
It can freely walk on its legs and is aggressive.
However, it's delicious, making it a favorite 
target for adventurers and chefs alike.
47.description:
A passable door summoned by the Star Tarot.
The stars are believed to guide one back home.
Passing through this door returns the traveler 
to a safe area. Adventurers often use it 
to return to a place of rest, or to retreat 
temporarily when the situation turns unfavorable.
51.description:
A young orc still in its growth phase, 
already about the size of a human.
It reacts to living beings and greedily 
absorbs their life force.
53.description:
A corpse reanimated through necromancy.
It still retains aggression and possesses 
considerable combat ability.
59.subtitle: Dwelling in Forest of Ruins
65.description:
A massive avian beast.
It charges at adventurers with its large body,
and also uses sonic attacks, so beware.
66.description:
A slime that mutated after mistakenly 
eating an adorable kitty,
and became cute itself as a result.
It has lost its will to attack,
but will puff up like a cat when threatened...
66.1:
The cat slime seems to 
really like me...
67.description:
A slime that mutated after mistakenly 
eating an adorable kitty,
and became cute itself as a result.
It has lost its will to attack,
but will puff up like a cat when threatened...
67.1:
The cat slime seems to 
really like me...
68.description:
A slime that mutated after mistakenly 
eating an adorable kitty,
and became cute itself as a result.
It has lost its will to attack,
but will puff up like a cat when threatened...
68.1:
The cat slime seems to 
really like me...
69.description:
A slime that mutated after mistakenly 
eating an adorable kitty,
and became cute itself as a result.
It has lost its will to attack,
but will puff up like a cat when threatened...
69.1:
The cat slime seems to 
really like me...
70.description:
A creature…? shaped like a banana.
A fairy born from the influence of the Abyssal 
aura, It poses little threat to adventurers.
However, there are rumors it can 
easily send people flying…
71.description:
A creature…? shaped like an apple.
A fairy born from the influence of the Abyssal 
aura, It poses little threat to adventurers.
However, there are rumors it can 
easily send people flying…
72.description:
The severed limb of a dead mage.
No one knows what its original owner went through,
But infused with necromancy, this hand stays active.
Adventurers often see it make obvious gestures 
when attacking.
73.description:
An alchemical elemental creature composed of  
water that wields elemental magic.
It has high resistance to physical attacks,
but cannot survive in environments without water.
77.description:
A stray cat possessed by demonic power.
It gained the ability to fly along with 
dark magical powers. But in the end, 
it’s still just a cat—
At most, it just shoots small magic blasts.
78.description:
A magical creature born from a dead soul’s grudge 
through necromancy. It endlessly roams graveyards 
and has high resistance to physical attacks,
and can spit out deadly ghost fire.
80.subtitle: Dwelling in Forgotten Catacomb
87.description:
A common monster found in the outskirts of 
the Abyss. It evolved a green color due to its 
habit of feeding on plants. When approached 
suddenly, it becomes agitated,and starts 
spraying corrosive slime.
88.description:
A slime that accidentally consumed a Jack Bomb.
Though it didn’t explode right away, 
it remains extremely unstable, and becomes 
agitated and self-destructive when provoked.
89.description:
A mutated slime influenced by the environment 
of a graveyard. It aggressively attacks adventurers 
like a zombie, becoming more vicious,  
and the deathly aura surrounding.
its body can infect others on contact,
causing instant death if you're not careful...
90.description:
A slime mutated after absorbing magic from 
an unknown source. It thrives in watery areas 
and creates thick armor of ice using its magic. 
It absorbs large amounts of water, 
rapidly cools it, and blasts it at adventurers.
91.description:
A sparkling slime that can discharge electricity 
all over its body. Even slimes don’t know what it 
ate to mutate like this. But in its current state of 
freely discharging electricity, getting close is dangerous...
92.description:
A slime that consumed magic-infused crystals, 
hardening its body. Tough minerals grow on its 
surface, forming deadly weapons.
While tougher, it’s still a slime at heart. 
Also, the ore it drops seems to be quite valuable…
101.description:
A grotesque creature born from an egg.
Its malformed, unnatural growth environment 
has twisted its body into a mass of tangled tissues.
It possesses a fierce urge to attack, 
driven by the desire to devour flesh and be reborn.
102.description:
Even in the deadly Abyss, littering isn’t cool.
Still, Whatever you toss vanishes by next day...
Feels like someone’s cleaning up.
But be careful—don’t toss in flammable stuff.
Treat it too rough, 
and you might trigger something nasty.
102.1:
Found a trash can...
What to do with it?
102.2:
Search Around
Drop Weapon
Drop Gear
102.3:
It’s just the stuff 
I just threw away...
102.4:
(Ugh... My backpack is completely full...
I’ll have to toss everything at once...)
106.description:
Wait, do peppers grow on trees?
Although \str[120] really hates it, 
I, as an adventurer, 
can’t afford to be picky with food.
107.description:
Easy to mistake for weeds 
if you do not look closely. 
Dig beneath the soil and you will find 
tasty potatoes.
108.description:
Tomatoes brimming with juice and 
a gentle fragrance, 
as if someone had raised them with great care...
109.description:
A fruit tree laden with strawberries 
that looks absolutely delicious.
It often attracts a certain creature to come 
and steal a bite.
110.description:
"I'm just a scarecrow.
Since I don't have a heart, 
I can't feel pain."
113.description:
A wild rabbit mutated by magical contamination—
the horn on its head is the mark of this change.
However, it’s still in its growth stage 
and not particularly dangerous.
Also, its meat remains tender and delicious.
115.description:
A slime engulfed in blazing flames—
just getting close to it radiates intense heat.
Normal attacks are nearly useless against it,
and adventurers can only be thankful
that this kind of monster only appears in 
extreme environments like lava fields.
119.description:
A mere shadow of the 
Death Devil's will—
no mortal survives its price.
Even this echo brings death 
to all it sees,
summoner included.
97.sentouryoku: \c[10]It's rude to ask a girl's stats~♥
97.description:
Looks like a harmless little girl,
but is actually a free-spirited Archdemon.
Friendly toward humans, but loves teasing them 
and savoring their flustered reactions.
She runs a shop out of whim, 
with items and prices changing on a whim as well.
Basically, she just wants to get her favorite salmon
from humans however she can...
97.1:
Oh my~ What a rare guest~ Hehe~
I’ve got some good stuff here, take your time♥
97.2:
Yaho~! What a coincidence~ So nice to see you again~!
Is it fate~? Or maybe you're just super lucky~?
97.3:
Hehe, either way~! When luck’s on your side,
you better watch out—someone might just snatch it away♥
97.4:
My shop’s a special one, you know~
I sell things you won’t find anywhere else~
97.5:
Mhm~ What’s up? Your face is all red~ \w[45]Hehe~ \w[45]
Did I charm you or something? You’re just too cute~
97.6:
These items are…
Who even are you…?
97.7:
Aha♥ Spiii~cy~ Adull~t~ only~
You’re into this kind of thing, huh?
97.8:
Of course~ I’ve got them♥
onii-san... are you interested~?
97.9:
Oh~ wanna know more about me?
Fair enough~ I haven’t introduced myself, have I~
97.10:
Well then, I’m~ The Archdemon from
the depths of the Abyss! Aki~!
97.11:
Hey now! Don’t give me that scary face~
I’m just here to make a little trade today~!
97.13:
Yes! That smell!
That’s it! Gimme it♥ Pleaaaase~!
97.14:
Come on~
You’ll give it to me, won’t you♥
97.15:
(Ah, so it was the salmon in my bag
that lured her in...)
97.16:
Mhm mhm~! This is exactly what I wanted!
I’ll make sure to thank you properly♥
97.17:
Please~ Even just a little bit is fine…
Share it with me? Pretty please♥
97.18:
(What should I do… Looks like
this brat really wants some salmon…)
97.20:
Hoh~    \w[45]
Are you trying to defy Lady Aki?
97.21:
Tsk tsk~ Such a naughty boy~!
Guess I’ll have to punish you properly♥
97.22:
\>\c[10]《Demonic Contract Ritual: Purehearted Human’s Absolute Curse =
\>From Today, Your Life Is Hell Mode》!!     \w[90]
97.23:
And with that—
You’ve been cursed—
97.24:
So much salmon for me♥ You're too sweet, onii-san~
Trying to win my heart, huh~?
97.25:
So cute♥ I just can’t resist~
Hehe~!
97.26:
Take this little cutie with you~
If you want to find me, just send it with a message~♥
97.27:
You want to buy this item?
Sure~ I’ll sell it to you~!
97.28:
Ah! But you know, I don’t really care about money~
For a demon like me, that stuff’s totally worthless~
97.29:
Hmm, you’ve got some decent muscles there,
So I’m sure you can manage~!
97.30:
...Hehe, if you want this item~!
Then trade it for some salmon~!
97.31:
There’s water all over the place nearby, right?
Shouldn’t be that hard for you to catch a few fish~?
97.32:
If you thought that was the end, you’re soooo wrong~♥
Unless you properly reflect, I’m never letting you off the hook!
97.33:
Also~ This curse? 
It’s gonna stick around for a while~♥
97.34:
Ahaha♥ What a pain, huh~?
Bet this is super annoying for you, onii-san♥
97.35:
Aww~ Wanna beg me to lift the curse~?
What should I do~♥
97.36:
And what if I say no~? What’ll you do~?
Aww, don’t make that face~ That’s not gonna work on me~
97.37:
Now I just wanna bully you more, onii-san♥
No curse lifting for you~ Ahaha♥
97.38:
Wow, you’re really desperate, huh? Such a ZAKO♥
Show me you’re sorry with more sincerity~♥
97.39:
(If I wanna break the curse…
I guess I really do have to offer her some fish…)
97.41:
So much salmon for me♥ sluuurp♥
Ahh~ It’s salmon heaven♥
97.42:
Alrighty~! The curse is lifted now~!
Hope we can play again soon, onii-san♥
97.43:
Well well~ Long time no see, onii-san~
You showed up at just the right time~♥
97.44:
Wanna try out a brand-new item?
It's a Mizumanju I made myself~
97.45:
The effect, you ask? Hehe~!
It makes your body extra sensitive♥
97.46:
And it doesn't just work on humans~
It’s super effective on monsters too!
97.47:
So, what do you think? Just ten salmon~?
Wanna buy it? No? Hurry up and decide♥
97.49:
Seriously, ZAKO onii-san, even your brain turned to ZAKO~?
Can’t even cough up a few fish… so useless♥
97.50:
No money, no salmon—what a weak, pathetic onii-san~
No wonder you're single and still a virgin~
97.51:
If you change your mind someday, come back and buy it~
Not that I care or anything♥
97.52:
Tch~ So boring, nya~
Can’t believe you passed on something this amazing♥
97.53:
Thanks for the purchase, nya~
Now I can go eat sooo much salmon again~
97.54:
Tch~ So boring, nya~
Can’t believe you passed on something this amazing♥
97.55:
Ah~ I mean, probably nothing will happen♥
But onii-san, you do look suuuper weak~
97.56:
So I figured I better warn you~
This, you know, you can use it on yourself too~
97.57:
And yeah, the effect is making your body suuuper sensitive♥
So like, definitely don’t try it on yourself, okay~?
97.58:
Or wait, you actually want to use it?
onii-san’s totally a hopeless little masochist, huh♥
97.59:
Kidding~♥ Well then,
come visit me again next time, okay~♥
97.60:
Too bad~ It's already sold out~?
Geez, onii-san, you really are that desperate, huh♥
97.61:
If you want more, you’ll have to wait till next time~
Buuut if you bring me salmon, I might make an exception♥
97.62:
Oh my♥ You want more? So greedy~!
Buying this much... are you planning something naughty~?
97.63:
Whoaaa—♥ Such high-quality salmon—!
you should’ve brought this out way earlier~
97.64:
If it’s that kind~
Just give me one and I’ll sell it to you~♥
97.65:
Hehe~ looking for something to watch late at night~?
Picking this time… what kind of spicy stuff are you hoping for~?
97.66:
Wanna watch it with Imouto~? onii-san, you’re 
getting more and more suspicious, aren’t you~? ♥
97.67:
But you’re super lucky, onii-san~
I just so happen to have something like that right here~
97.68:
If you want it,
trade me some salmon~
97.69:
Not that boring, everyday salmon though~
I want something higher quality ♥
97.70:
Whaaat~? onii-san, you’re such a ZAKO~
You seriously can’t even get premium salmon?
97.72:
But fine, 
I’ll give you a little help ♥
That way… you’ll be able to 
catch fish more easily, right~?
97.74:
Well well~ onii-san, you’re not totally useless~
You caught such high-quality salmon ♥
97.75:
Alright ♥ Here, this is what I promised~
Go enjoy it properly, onii-san~
97.76:
Even with my help~
onii-san, you’re so pathetic~
98.description:
A candy machine filled with all sorts of 
colorful sweets. All of them are handmade konpeitō 
by the shop owner.
It seems to be made with some special ingredients, 
giving off a strange but pleasant aroma…
But even if you ask out of curiosity what’s inside,
All you’ll get is a meaningful smile from the girl...
98.1:
found a candy machine 
filled with brightly colored sweets—
98.3:
\>Let’s see... One spin costs...
\c[6]\v[86]\c[0]yen!? \< That’s expensive!!
98.4:
\str[120] might like these kinds of snacks...
What should I do? Should I give it a try?
98.5:
Let’s see... One spin costs... \w[60]\c[6]\v[86]\c[0]yen
What should I do? Should I give it a try?
98.6:
Pay with money
Trade with fish
98.7:
But... I don’t have 
that much money on me...
98.8:
Yes, yes~♥
Just offer a bit more salmon then...
121.description:
This is a "trial".
A trial rising from the Abyss.
The growth of a monster... 
is to defeat the frailty of its own past...
Right? You are the same, are you not?
O adventurer, you who seek the truth—
